case_title: BENSON ZHEN VS. HECTOR GUEVARRA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHEN, BENSON SERVED AUG-06-2009, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT GUEVARRA, HECTOR INDIVIDUALLY  AND DBA  PAMPANGA'S BEST BBQ
